category_note: Quantcast operates a programmatic platform with high-impact display formats (rich media), standard display, and audience products. Specs largely follow IAB standard with some custom interactive units.
source: STUB ENTRY — Quantcast supplies spec sheets per campaign and per high-impact unit. Confirm with Quantcast account manager.

best_practice_notes: Standard IAB display best practices apply

formats.interactive_features: Expanding, in-banner video, interactive elements supported
formats.supply_deadline_rule: 10 working days before live (allows QA of interactive elements)
restrictions: Polite load required for assets above initial budget
best_practice_notes: Interactive units perform best with clear visual affordances (button hover states, animation cues)
Test interactive behaviour across browsers before submission
High-impact units typically require longer creative QA — build in extra time

refresh_instructions: Request the Quantcast Creative Specifications PDF from your Quantcast account manager
High-impact unit specs are typically supplied per unit via individual builder docs
